# Q8 beacon stats: count/avg/stddev population of inter-arrival per pair (network beaconing)

**Dataset**: `xdr_data`

C2 beaconing detection — find steady-cadence connections to a single destination. Q8 beacon stats: count/avg/stddev population of inter-arrival per pair. `windowcomp lag()` yields the prior row's value within a partition (alias is the LAST clause); `timestamp_diff(a, b, "SECOND")` gives a duration.

```sql
dataset = xdr_data | filter event_type = ENUM.NETWORK and action_local_ip != null and action_remote_ip != null | fields action_local_ip, action_remote_ip, _time | windowcomp lag(_time) by action_local_ip, action_remote_ip sort asc _time as prev_time | filter prev_time != null | alter gap_s = timestamp_diff(_time, prev_time, "SECOND") | comp count() as intervals, avg(gap_s) as mean_gap, stddev_population(gap_s) as jitter by action_local_ip, action_remote_ip | filter intervals >= 3 | sort asc jitter | limit 30
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (returned 30). From the 20-scenario XQL coverage program; technique is dataset-portable._
